examples: For example, an excess of certain proteins can cause cells to proliferate abnormally and become cancerous; a lack of the protein insulin results in diabetes.
At the other extreme, we might successfully translocate the species, but within five or ten years that species could proliferate and become an invasive species.
In the corporate environment, it's easy for worksheet files to proliferate rapidly.
It is nice to read of new entrepreneurship being discovered in places where people proliferate.
Keith Lee, co-founder and chief executive of Booyah, also thinks the iPad will proliferate.
